author: @silverssonyoutube8438
text: i need people to pray for my missing cat. its been missing for a week . i love him so much . i just want him to come back home . ive been crying too .

author: @geodeaholicm4889
text: I'm glad your cat turned up ok. depending on my schedule & the weather, my sandy-kitty walks on a leash with me atleast 2, sometimes 3, & occasionally 4 half mile laps of the apartment complex each day.  it is fresh air & good exercise for the both of us.  she is never off the leash outside because of hazards from indifferent to malicious drivers & a wide assortment of hungry native critters... the reactions from occasional people who have never seen a kitty walking her master are amusing too.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol - something i would love to see too lol

author: @mannylenz5288
text: My neighbours lost their cat a while back. She turned out to be stuck in the sock drawer, and they found her a few days later. She didn't even mew to get help, so must have enjoyed it in there.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol cats are strange creatures lol

author: @randomlettersqzkebkw
text: yup, that char definitely looks clean from that soap you made

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: i did think of trying it on the cat but she wouldn't sit still long enough

author: @TheBaconWizard
text: Aw :) Huge cat person here too, glad she arrived back safe and sound.

author: @thagrit
text: Holy cow! Your cat looks just like mine! Well one of the two. His name is Dribbles. He had the name when I got him. Or when he got me. I gave him a piece of turkey on thanksgiving and he moved in on me the next day.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: dribbles lol - my cat is called Kaali - she is a killer lol - leaves mice and birds all over the place - I won't interfere - because as JPrice said - circle of life!

author: @tubejim101
text: Happy that you got your cat back home

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: yeah mate - me too - i'm a bit of a softy when it comes to the cat lol

author: @jprice1122
text: My cat went missing a week ago, but I live in an area full of coyotes, bobcat, hawks, owls and bears...  Looking for a new kitten (yeah, the circle of life...).

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: It's funny the hole they leave when they go

replies.author: @thagrit
replies.text: Robert Murray-Smith I've had my older cat 16 years.

author: @Kroska1
text:
I've got to get one of those for my cat.
Can you name the product name by chance?

replies.text: it's called loc8or - rubbish name i know - but it seems to work
